column1: Hey Taylor, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
our spring break is the week of march 14th
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book?
worddd yea thats where I'll be too
how many ppl in your group so far?
so far just three of us
yea thats solid which school you all from?
we go to parsons in new york
oh dope! will def hook it up for y'all
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
as soon as possible but like latest late January
okay cool yea I got you. things are def moving quickly rn. ill send what we have at the moment
will add a payment plan to make things easier for everyone. split things into 2
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
word whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if it came through
Perfect. Lmk what the group thinks!
hey quick question if we wanted to add another person to our group later can we do that after we book and then pay for that price instead or do we have to wait to book until we know how many people
yea we can do that. are there only 2 of you ready?
okay yea we can get you 2 set up and then if we wanna add the third we'll take a look and get her added in
what's the info for the party pass

party pass comes with round trip transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our hosted nights at some of the top nightclubs in Punta Cana. We do Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca, and we have our open bar booze cruise
you can either get it as individual events, or do the 3 event bundle for $200
is the booze cruise included in that 200
you can use one of the 3 events for the booze cruise yea
so if we wanted to do 4 nights for 3 with the party package what would be our total cost
4 nights stay, three of you in a room, 3 event party pass, $870 per person
heyy Taylor whats up, how we feelin about that package so far?
still talking to the group but should be booking within the next few days
hey Taylor happy new year! did we want to lock down that option?
i'm in vegas right now but when i'm back we'll book asap
hey Taylor whats up, did we wanna get a reservation set up for that option?
that text def wasnt meant for you my b! lol
but cool ill set that up now, did we want to have the party pass included for the $870 total?
yes so what we're trying to figure out is the amount of people
okay, how many (ish) are we lookin at now
me and my roomate are for sure and we will book it now
we're dealing with like a group of 10 right now but i don't want to deal with all them so i would rather just book for the two of us now
okay cool lol I feel you. ill set you and your roomate up with your own room for now. as the rest of the 8 wake up we can add them onto your reservation as long as we have the availability
did you want the party pass added in still?
ok so we officially want to book it just for the two with the party pass
hey morning, okay cool will send this over!
just sent. added some details on how to navigate through but lmk if y'all need any help with the process
np! were y'all able to get on?
yea the deposit is $200 due today to get secured. and then the balance is due in 2 weeks. gives you a little time to gather yourself
Ok chill we both made the accounts and paid
I can't tell if we have the party package or not
hey morning. yea so looks like right now you have Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and the Booze Cruise. theres one more event, Maroca nightclub, that y'all can do. did you want that one added in too?
can we add it later if we wanted
hello I was wondering what the policy for refunds was
sup Taylor. did you add the optional travel protection insurance? If so, its a cancel for any reason policy
i didn't originally can i still do that
you may have just missed the window but can give it a try. here the link to our insurance partner Travel Insured https://www.travelinsured.com/agency/
you not able to go on the trip anymore?
ahh got you. hopefully you can go! will be dope to have y'all there
Hello! I would like to cancel my portion of the trip please
hey! ahh okay I got you. did you add the travel protection insurance plan
got you. mind sending an email to me at spiffy@springbreaku.com with your request for cancellation, that'll get the process started
Can be a quick simple email just asking to be cancelled
